revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image: a 64x64 pixel-art terrain tile sheet for game development. Use a strict 4x4 grid of 16 frames, each frame exactly 16x16 pixels. No visible grid lines, no tile IDs, no labels, no borders, no text, no watermark.

Profile: snes16_platformer_v1. Pixel-art style: crisp low-resolution 16-bit SNES-style pixels, no antialiasing blur, consistent bright mythical-Japan satoyama palette, soft warm golden-hour top-left light, hand-painted Ghibli-like feeling but still true pixel art with readable pixel clusters. Use dark one-pixel outline where useful. Keep every frame contained inside its own 16x16 cell and at consistent scale.

Subject override for this sheet: top-down lush forest canopy autotile, a sacred grove / 鎮守の森. Dense rounded treetops in deep matcha, emerald, and fresh green with dappled sunlight highlights and cool shadow between crowns. Readable individual treetop masses, painterly-soft color choices translated into crisp pixels.

Layout semantics:
Row 1: four dense canopy interior variations, rounded treetops filling the tile, no edge.
Row 2: canopy-to-grass edge tiles in order N, S, W, E; forest crowns meet open grass on that side, with natural broken edge overlap and no hard rectangular band.
Row 3: outer corner transition tiles in order NW, NE, SW, SE; canopy corner meeting bright grass, with chipped leafy breakup and soft shadows.
Row 4: accent tiles in order: tall dark pine crown, small clearing gap, mossy boulder under trees, leafy bush cluster. Keep these usable as 16x16 world-map terrain accents.

Tilemap quality: final sheet must not read as a checkerboard or repeated square stamps. Vary texture, edge breakup, dappled light, crown shapes, and shadow while keeping the set cohesive. Think world-map forest masses, not close-up village ground detail. Fill frames edge to edge where terrain exists. Use fully opaque artwork. Fill any empty/background space with solid #FF00FF magenta only.

Avoid all copyrighted character, logo, or franchise likeness references. No Mario, Nintendo, Zelda, Final Fantasy, Pokemon, Dragon Quest, Secret of Mana, Okami, or Sakuna characters/logos/likeness. No samurai armor, kabuto helmet, ninja outfit, two-sword daisho, guns, modern objects, horror mood, dark gloomy palette, birds, companion creatures, letter emblems, modern text, watermark, or UI.

Output must be one single 64x64 PNG image, crisp high-resolution pixel art displaying the complete 4x4 tile sheet.
